name: Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: PART I . Pending Acquisition by Merck Sharp & Dohme LLC On March 24, 2026, we entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger (the Merger Agreement) by and among us, Merck Sharp & Dohme LLC, a New Jersey limited liability company (Parent), and Thailand Merger Sub, Inc., a Delaware corporation and wholly owned subsidiary of Parent (Purchaser).
